questions.question: Explain the key difference between learning in deep learning and pure optimization. Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the role of exploration and adaptation in deep learning

questions.question: Describe how deep learning models adapt to their environment, contrasting this with the process of pure optimization. Use a concrete example to illustrate your point.
questions.hint: Highlight the role of neural networks in learning and adaptation

questions.question: What is the primary difference between the learning mechanism in deep learning and that in reinforcement learning? Provide a specific example of a deep learning model that utilizes this difference.
questions.hint: Focus on the interplay between rewards and exploration in reinforcement learning
